name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: San Antonio, TX's Swift Title Loans on S New Braunfels Ave provides fast title loans and payday cash advances.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans stands at 4246 S New Braunfels Ave, Unit 115, in San Antonio, Texas. This standalone location is open Monday through Friday from 9am to 7pm, and Saturday from 10am to 5pm. Whether you're heading south from downtown San Antonio or navigating the South Side's commercial corridor, you'll find the storefront accessible for quick loan applications.

At this San Antonio location, the team specializes in title-secured loans and payday advances. You can walk in with your vehicle title, valid government ID, and proof of residency to explore loan options. For questions or to pre-qualify, call 210-791-9531 during business hours.

If you need urgent cash in San Antonio, TX, bring your vehicle title and ID. Quick turnaround and straightforward processes define the Swift Title Loans experience.
address: 4246 S New Braunfels Ave #115, San Antonio, TX 78223

company_info.headquarters: 4246 S New Braunfels Ave #115, San Antonio, TX 78223

pros: Same-day funding available for applicants who sign up by noon
Accepts borrowers with bad credit and past bankruptcies without rejection
Wide loan range ($100–$50,000) accommodates various financial needs
Borrowers can keep and use their vehicle during the loan term
256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for online security
Staff assistance available during application and paperwork process
Extended hours (Mon–Fri until 7pm, Saturday 10am–5pm) for working customers
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on website—cost of borrowing is opaque
Title loans carry repossession risk if payments are missed; this material risk is not prominently disclosed
Customer reviews appear concentrated around one staff member (Alfred) and lack diversity in reviewer experiences or outcomes
No information provided about payment plan options, despite customer requests for more flexibility
Limited digital tools: no mention of mobile app, online payment portal, or automated reminders despite customer suggestions
best_for: Borrowers with poor credit or bankruptcy history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Consumers needing emergency cash ($500–$2,000) within 24 hours and willing to use vehicle as collateral
Individuals who own a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle and need short-term liquidity
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for borrowers with poor credit who need emergency cash within 24 hours and own a vehicle outright or nearly outright. The primary caveat is that APR and fee information are completely absent from the website, making it impossible to assess true cost; additionally, the risk of vehicle repossession for non-payment is inherent to title loans but not explicitly highlighted, and borrowers should understand they are using their vehicle as collateral for short-term cash.
services: Same-day funding for applicants approved by noon
Loan service for borrowers with bad credit or past bankruptcies
Vehicle retention during loan term (borrower keeps car)
meta_description: Swift Title Loans in San Antonio, TX at 4246 S New Braunfels Ave. Fast title loans and payday advances. Open M-F 9am-7pm, Sat 10am-5pm.
